input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.14.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.14.1
            TITLE: prior to inspection approval

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.14.1: Prior to Inspection Approval
IN.14.1 Prior to Inspection Approval 
Once the vehicle has been presented for judging in the Cost or Design Events, or submitted for 
Technical Inspection, and until the vehicle has the full Inspection Approval, the only 
modifications permitted to the vehicle are those directed by the Inspector(s) and noted on the 
Inspection Form.

final_answer: Prior to Inspection Approval Once the vehicle has been presented for judging in the Cost or Design Events, or submitted for Technical Inspection, and until the vehicle has the full Inspection Approval, the only modifications permitted to the vehicle are those directed by the Inspector(s) and noted on the Inspection Form.
